issues.note: All 8 case study links (lines 73-128) point to work/ subdirectory that does not exist. Every link delivers a 404.
issues.suggest: Create work/ directory with case study HTML pages, or replace hrefs with anchor fragments until individual pages ship.

issues.note: work.html is the only public page with no site footer and no secondary navigation. Navigation dead end on direct arrival.
issues.suggest: Add standard <footer id="site-footer"> with .footer-row + .footer-nav matching services.html pattern.

issues.note: LCP image wesley-services.jpg is 1.4MB at 3747x4683px; hover image is 1.5MB. Rendered at ~384x480 CSS px. 4-5x resolution overshoot. 2.9MB total image payload. Also contains EXIF metadata (Canon EOS R6m2, datetime).
issues.suggest: Resize to 900x1125px, export as WebP quality 80, target <120KB each. Add srcset. Strip EXIF.

issues.note: Missing <meta property="og:image"> on homepage. Social shares render blank preview cards.
issues.suggest: Add <meta property="og:image" content="https://wesley-m.com/images/wesley-portrait.jpg"> and og:image:alt to index.html head.

issues.note: resume.html is the only public page missing <meta name="author" content="Wesley Melo">.
issues.suggest: Add <meta name="author" content="Wesley Melo"> after the meta description tag.

issues.selector: --fg-hover: #7A8299 (used on byline, zone-link, side-meta, opinion-meta, most-read-meta, reading-link-source)
issues.note: Contrast ratio 3.83:1 on white background. WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text <18px. Fails for all metadata text and the interactive zone-link element.
issues.suggest: Darken --fg-hover to #636D85 or darker to reach 4.5:1 on white. Defined in css/blog.css line 5.

issues.note: Hero splash image has loading="lazy" but is above-fold LCP candidate. Also sourced from external picsum.photos CDN. No fetchpriority="high".
issues.suggest: Change to loading="eager" fetchpriority="high". Host images locally.

issues.note: Carousel container (tabindex=0, role=list) receives keyboard focus but has no :focus-visible style in home.css. Violates WCAG 2.4.11 Focus Appearance.
issues.suggest: Add .about-cards:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--fg); outline-offset: 4px; } to css/home.css.

issues.note: Skip link has position:absolute but no z-index. Sticky top-bar has z-index:50 on other pages, could paint over the skip link when it becomes visible on focus.
issues.suggest: Add z-index: 100 to .skip-link in css/base.css.

issues.note: home.css defines --border and --border-heavy tokens but uses raw #FFFFFF in 9+ declarations instead of tokens. Theme changes won't propagate.
issues.suggest: Replace #FFFFFF literals with var(--fg) in .about-card border, .process-list borders, .about-card:hover background/box-shadow, and SVG fill.

issues.note: Duplicate :focus-visible declaration. Two back-to-back .cap-cta-link:focus-visible blocks. Second overrides first.
issues.suggest: Merge into a single block. Remove the duplicate rule on line 337.

issues.note: Three CSS classes defined in home.css have no matching HTML in index.html. Dead code.
issues.suggest: Delete .process-row-head, .process-row:hover .process-arrow, and .cap-intro blocks from css/home.css.

issues.note: work.html loads two CSS files with competing :root token blocks and scroll-snap overrides. Relationship is undocumented in work.css.
issues.suggest: Add explicit comment to work.css documenting inherited tokens from services.css. Low risk, zero-cost documentation.

issues.note:
uses
to force line break. At tablet widths the break becomes incorrect for available width, risking CLS on reflow.
issues.suggest:
Remove
, let CSS clamp() and line-height handle wrapping.

issues.note: blog.html missing og:image. Social shares have no preview image.
issues.suggest: Add <meta property="og:image" content="https://wesley-m.com/images/wesley-portrait.jpg"> to blog.html head.

issues.selector: head (no link rel=preload for LCP image)
issues.note: No for LCP hero image. fetchpriority=high on is good but doesn't start fetch until parser reaches the img in body.
issues.suggest: Add <link rel="preload" as="image" href="images/wesley-services.jpg" fetchpriority="high"> to services.html <head>.

issues.note: scroll-snap-stop: always on all 7 sections may trap keyboard users, particularly around the FAQ section with interactive <details>. WCAG 2.1.2 risk.
issues.suggest: Change to scroll-snap-stop: normal on services.html sections, or limit always to the hero section only.

issues.note: Top-bar navigation links on mobile have no padding-block. Effective tap height ~14px at 12px font. WCAG 2.5.8 requires minimum 24px target.
issues.suggest: Add padding-block: 10px to .top-bar-links .link inside the max-width: 768px media query in services.css.

issues.note: 250-line stylesheet is inlined. Cannot be cached by CDN or browser across page loads.
issues.suggest: Extract to css/resume.css and load via <link rel=stylesheet>.

issues.note: resume.html implements its own email obfuscation script, duplicating the logic in js/email.js. Parallel implementation: email address changes require two file updates.
issues.suggest: Convert to .js-email class pattern and load js/email.js. Remove inline script.

issues.note: 9 links use href="#" as placeholder. They are keyboard-reachable, announced by screen readers as active destinations. Reading links also have target="_blank" which opens blank tabs on click.
issues.suggest: Use aria-disabled or remove <a> tags for unlinked items. Remove target="_blank" from reading links until real URLs are added.

issues.note: Blog page top-bar contains only a Back link, inconsistent with services and work pages which show full 6-link nav.
issues.suggest: Replace minimal nav with standard .top-bar-inner / .top-bar-links component. Add aria-current=page to Blog link.

issues.note: Alt text describes placeholder stock photo visual content (forest canopy) rather than conveying meaning in article context.
issues.suggest: Update alt text to be contextually meaningful for the article, or use alt="" if image is purely decorative.

issues.note: styleguide.css comment says 'about.css provides the actual component styles' but about.css does not exist. Component demo sections render unstyled.
issues.suggest: Create css/about.css with canonical component styles and load in styleguide.html, or document that sections 04-10 are stubs.

issues.note: 380KB 2565x2565px portrait image loaded without loading=lazy or width/height attributes on an internal-only page.
issues.suggest: Add loading="lazy" and real alt text. Or use a smaller thumbnail.

issues.note: 7 instances of — and – in styleguide copy. Violates project no-dash copy rule (CLAUDE.md, memory).
issues.suggest: Replace with commas, colons, or hyphens per context. E.g. '2023 — 2025' -> '2023 to 2025'. Remove on next edit per grandfathering rule.

issues.note: Blog footer uses 12 hardcoded hex values (#2B3856, #FFFFFF) instead of the CSS variables defined in the same file's :root block.
issues.suggest: Replace literals: background: #2B3856 -> var(--fg), color: #FFFFFF -> var(--bg), border: 2px solid #FFFFFF -> var(--rule-medium).

issues.note: Three production JPEG files contain full EXIF blocks (camera: Canon EOS R6m2, datetime: 2025-02-01, software versions).
issues.suggest: Strip EXIF during image optimization pass: exiftool -all= images/*.jpg or equivalent.

issues.note:
Wesley Melo

— spans are cosmetic with no CSS targeting. Unnecessary DOM nodes.
issues.suggest:
Simplify to

Wesley Melo

.

issues.note: aria-label="Site footer" on <footer> is redundant. The <footer> element already exposes a contentinfo landmark. Screen readers may announce both.
issues.suggest: Remove aria-label="Site footer" from <footer> elements on index.html (line 309) and blog.html (line 309).

issues.note: No page sets <meta name="theme-color">. Browser chrome does not adapt to site's navy color.
issues.suggest: Add <meta name="theme-color" content="#2B3856"> to all public page heads.

issues.selector: h1 vs og:description vs ld+json description
issues.note: Visual h1 ('Eight cases. Twelve years.'), meta description ('Eight case studies across twelve years'), and OG description ('Eight engagements across twelve years') are inconsistent.
issues.suggest: Align OG and meta description wording to match h1 copy.

issues.note: Arrow uses opacity transition. prefers-reduced-motion block removes transition but arrow still hidden at rest. Users with reduced motion have to hover to see the arrow.
issues.suggest: In reduced motion block, set .hero-index-item:hover .hero-index-arrow { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } so arrow is always visible.

issues.note: All pages use <link rel="icon" href="data:,"> — suppresses favicon 404 but shows no icon in browser tabs or bookmarks.
issues.suggest: Create favicon.svg or favicon.ico and update the link tag.

issues.note: When .cta-card is hovered, .cta-button focus ring uses var(--fg) outline which becomes white-on-white on the inverted card background.
issues.suggest: Add .cta-card:hover .cta-button:focus-visible { outline-color: var(--bg); } to services.css.

issues.note: EB Garamond is in the font stack but not loaded from a font CDN. On Linux/ChromeOS falls back to Times New Roman.
issues.suggest: Add Google Fonts link for EB Garamond or accept the system fallback explicitly in the font stack comment.

issues.note: All 12 images sourced from picsum.photos external CDN. No fallback if picsum is down. Broken image icons appear on failure.
issues.suggest: Host images locally when real article images are available. Add onerror handler in the interim.

issues.note: Styleguide has noindex but is not blocked in robots.txt. If robots directives are ignored, styleguide content could be indexed.
issues.suggest: Add Disallow: /styleguide.html to robots.txt, or confirm noindex is sufficient.
